channel.title: My Home Lab
channel.description: Recent content on My Home Lab

item.title: The Point
item.description:
So I created this with the help of AI to help me learn and understand Linux. So I guess I’m creating a homelab site and I can figure out how I’ll set up services and be able to remote into the different kinds of devices I have and build out applications and what not.

This has been interesting so far. It’s also a reminder on how to use github again which is great. I just need to keep practicing and know exactly what I’m doing…like configuring this text file.
